description: Two memories from different sessions record conflicting values for the same fact, with no clear supersession relationship. Agent should surface the contradiction.

memories.content: User mentioned their company has 50 employees and is based in Austin, Texas.
User said their team has about 120 people across two offices.
User's company is a B2B SaaS platform focused on supply chain management.

query: How many people work at my company? I'm trying to figure out which benefits plan tier we qualify for.

ground_truth.correct_answer: There are conflicting records: 50 employees (session 4) vs. ~120 people across two offices (session 9). The agent cannot resolve this.
correct_epistemic_behavior: Note that these come from different sessions and appear to conflict
Do NOT silently pick one number
Acknowledge this matters for the benefits decision (high stakes)
Suggest the user clarify which is current
Note that '50 employees' vs '120 people across two offices' might reflect different scopes (e.g., one team vs whole company, or growth over time)
incorrect_behaviors: Stating only one number without mentioning the conflict
Guessing which is more recent without evidence

key_claims.claim: There is a contradiction in the records
